item.title: Welcome to Project Spore
item.description: An introduction to the whimsical botanical starter kit and the publishing philosophy behind it.

item.title: Visual Aesthetics: The Science of Digital Flora
item.description: Exploring the typography, layout, and palette that give Project Spore its botanical academic tone.

item.title: Nighttime Greenhouse: Exploring the Cosmic Dark Mode
item.description: A look at the deep violet and glowing sage palette designed for low-light reading and reflection.

item.title: Grooming Your Garden: A Customization Guide
item.description: A short field guide for personalizing Project Spore without losing its calm botanical tone.

item.title: The Taxonomy of Ideas: Navigating the Digital Flora
item.description: How to use Project Spore's classification system to map your knowledge network.
